name: Blue Moon Metals Inc.
description: Blue Moon Metals Inc. is a Canadian-based exploration and development company focused on advancing a portfolio of five brownfield polymetallic projects located in the United States and Norway. The company specializes in critical metals, including zinc, copper, tungsten, germanium, and gallium, which are essential to the global economy and national security. By targeting projects with existing infrastructure and historical data, Blue Moon Metals aims to transition into a base metals miner and operator, supported by a strong group of strategic shareholders and a commitment to developing assets in stable, Tier 1 jurisdictions.
